subject: [PATCH v6 04/20] nfsd: allow nfsd to get a dir lease with an ignore mask

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch allows the NFS server to request a directory lease with an ignore mask, enabling it to selectively ignore certain events such as file creation, deletion, and renaming. The patch introduces a new function `nfsd_notify_to_ignore` that converts notification types into an ignore mask, which is then applied to the file lease flags. This change enables more fine-grained control over the notifications provided to clients, addressing a limitation in the previous implementation where all events were always reported.
